description: This file defines a Spring Boot REST controller class 'AuthController' providing authentication endpoints such as register, login, refresh, and logout for JWT-based authentication within the BusinessLoanAPI project.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: REST controller providing JWT authentication endpoints such as register, login, refresh, and logout.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles applicant registration requests, creating a new user with MFA disabled for MVP.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Validates user credentials and returns JWT access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Rotates the refresh token and provides new access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revokes the provided refresh token, effectively logging out the user.
